# roxy

> High-performance MCP (Model Context Protocol) proxy server in Rust that bridges MCP clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Zed) to upstream handlers running as FastCGI (PHP-FPM) or HTTP(S) backends — letting you write MCP servers in any language without reimplementing JSON-RPC, transport, or capability negotiation.

roxy handles everything performance-critical — `stdio` and Streamable HTTP transports, protocol parsing, FastCGI connection pooling, TLS via rustls, capability caching, header forwarding — via the official `rmcp` crate. Upstream handlers only deal with a small simplified JSON protocol: receive an `UpstreamRequest`, return an `UpstreamCallResult`. Supports MCP 2025-06-18 features including elicitation (multi-turn tool input), structured tool output, and resource links.

## Docs

- [User Guide](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/docs/USER_GUIDE.md): primary end-user documentation — plain-English overview, installation, quick start, transport modes, full CLI + env-var reference, detailed backend API (every request type, every field), header forwarding rules, error reference, logging, full configuration examples, FAQ
- [README](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/README.md): short landing page with install, 3-step quick start, and links into the User Guide
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): architecture map and key file pointers for code assistants
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): development workflow and contribution guidelines
- [BENCHMARKS](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/docs/BENCHMARKS.md): performance benchmark results and methodology
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/LICENSE): Apache-2.0

## Examples

- [handler.php](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/examples/handler.php): reference PHP upstream handler (works with PHP-FPM via FastCGI)
- [handler.py](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/examples/handler.py): reference Python upstream handler (HTTP backend)
- [handler.ts](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/examples/handler.ts): reference TypeScript/Node upstream handler (HTTP backend)
- [echo_upstream.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/examples/echo_upstream.rs): minimal echo upstream used in tests and benchmarks
- [bench_client.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/examples/bench_client.rs): benchmark client

## Source

- [src/server.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/src/server.rs): `RoxyServer<E>` — implements `rmcp::ServerHandler`, discovers upstream capabilities at startup, forwards MCP calls to the configured executor, filters hop-by-hop headers for forwarding
- [src/executor/mod.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/src/executor/mod.rs): `UpstreamExecutor` trait with `execute()` and `discover()`
- [src/executor/fastcgi.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/src/executor/fastcgi.rs): `FastCgiExecutor` — TCP or Unix socket, `deadpool` pooling, CGI `HTTP_*` parameter mapping
- [src/executor/http.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/src/executor/http.rs): `HttpExecutor` — `reqwest` + rustls, custom headers, configurable timeouts
- [src/protocol.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/src/protocol.rs): internal JSON protocol — `UpstreamRequest`, `UpstreamCallResult`, `UpstreamDiscoverResponse`, `UpstreamEnvelope`
- [src/config.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/src/config.rs): CLI config via `clap`, `UpstreamKind` auto-detection from URL
- [src/main.rs](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/src/main.rs): entry point — parses CLI, selects executor, starts stdio or HTTP transport

## Optional

- [User Guide — backend API](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/docs/USER_GUIDE.md#10-the-backend-api-detailed): direct anchor — complete JSON protocol reference with request/response schemas for `discover`, `call_tool`, `read_resource`, `get_prompt`, `elicitation_cancelled`
- [User Guide — CLI flags](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/docs/USER_GUIDE.md#8-cli-flags-reference): direct anchor — every flag, env var, default, and example
- [User Guide — FAQ](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/docs/USER_GUIDE.md#16-frequently-asked-questions): common questions answered
- [Russian README](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/i18n/README.ru.md): translated overview (also available: uk, be, pl, de, fr, es, zh-CN, ja under `i18n/`)
- [Cargo.toml](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/Cargo.toml): Rust edition 2024, key deps: `rmcp` 1.3, `fastcgi-client` 0.11, `reqwest` 0.12, `deadpool`, `tokio`, `axum`
- [install.sh](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/blob/main/install.sh): prebuilt-binary installer for any Unix
- [packaging/](https://github.com/petstack/roxy/tree/main/packaging): Homebrew, .deb, .rpm, and static tarball packaging
